mapper.sql: id, package_id, version_id, stable_key, process_definition_key, business_version, bpmn_resource, trigger, object_type_key, event_type, authorization_policy_key, variable_mappings, startup_condition_rule_key, declared_permissions, instance_migration_policy, migration_validation_rule_key, revision, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO domain_package_workflow_binding (id, package_id, version_id, stable_key, process_definition_key, business_version, bpmn_resource, trigger, object_type_key, event_type, authorization_policy_key, variable_mappings, startup_condition_rule_key, declared_permissions, instance_migration_policy, migration_validation_rule_key, revision, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{packageId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{versionId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{stableKey}, #{processDefinitionKey}, #{businessVersion}, #{bpmnResource}, #{trigger, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{objectTypeKey}, #{eventType}, #{authorizationPolicyKey}, #{variableMappingsJson}, #{startupConditionRuleKey}, #{declaredPermissionsJson}, #{instanceMigrationPolicy, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{migrationValidationRuleKey}, #{revision}, #{createdAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE domain_package_workflow_binding SET bpmn_resource = #{bpmnResource}, authorization_policy_key = #{authorizationPolicyKey}, variable_mappings = #{variableMappingsJson}, startup_condition_rule_key = #{startupConditionRuleKey}, declared_permissions = #{declaredPermissionsJson}, instance_migration_policy = #{instanceMigrationPolicy, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, migration_validation_rule_key = #{migrationValidationRuleKey}, updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision}
